entry.text:
[b]Home commands allow you to create and manage your own personal teleport locations anywhere on the map.[/b] [b]Everyone can set one home per player, supporter get extra homes depending on their tier.[-]
Creating your home location: /HOME [B6A67B]NAME[-] ADD This will create home location named [B6A67B]NAME[-] at the location you were standing when executing command. Please note that name will be saved in lowercase, so NAME, Name, NaMe and etc - all will be saved as [B6A67B]name[-].
